    所有程序包的分层结构

    程序包分层结构:
    • com.gdxsoft.api,
    • com.gdxsoft.chatRoom,
    • com.gdxsoft.chatRoom.dao,
    • com.gdxsoft.chatRoom.sdk,
    • com.gdxsoft.dev,
    • com.gdxsoft.message.sms,

    • com.gdxsoft.web.user,
    • com.gdxsoft.web.weixin,
    • com.google.zxing.client.j2se
